title: CloudEvent Envelope (minimum viable)
description: The bare minimum a CloudEvent needs to flow through the pipeline. Any JSON object matching this envelope is a real event worth persisting and broadcasting — even if the full cloud_event.schema.json rejects it because the subtype is unknown or the agent_payload shape is unrecognized. This is Tier B in the fuzzy-pipe classification: structurally valid, content-unknown.

id.description: Unique event identifier (UUID or derived). Used for dedup.

type.description: CloudEvent type — always 'io.arc.event' in Open Story.

raw.description: The original agent-written data, never mutated. This is the sovereignty foundation — if nothing else survives enrichment, raw survives.
